title: Helmet Hider
description: Protect your head without hiding your face! A resource pack to make your helmet invisible.
body:
# ![Diamond Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87546287ae3800325e9827d5b646bab9b2145b5e_0.webp)  **Helmet Hider** ![Mirror](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8446f395e35e33016842438de09a5242385531f5_0.webp)

Tired of helmets ruining your skin or outfit?
This resource pack makes all helmets invisible when worn — except for the _Leather Helmet_ cuz leather is too cool to be invisible.

**FEATURES**
- Hides Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite, Turtle, and Copper helmets.
- Armor trims are invisible on worn helmets (but still visible on the item icon).
- Works seamlessly in Minecraft 1.21.2 → 26.1 and will be updating to the latest whenever possible!
- No mods required — just drop it into your Resource Packs folder.

Perfect for screenshots, roleplay, or just keeping your look clean without losing protection.

![Diamond Armor Set with preview of invisible Diamond Helmet.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e305927685be6d42aba10f418e8c563aa422099.png)


<details>
<summary>What's New</summary>

31st March 2026
- Added version 26.1.

</details>
